programme.title: The Breakfast Club
programme.desc: Five high school students from different walks of life endure a Saturday detention under a power-hungry principal. The disparate group includes rebel John, princess Claire, outcast Allison, brainy Brian and Andrew, the jock. Each has a chance to tell his or her story, making the others see them a little differently -- and when the day ends, they question whether school will ever be the same.

As Andie starts falling for Blane, she begins to realize that dating someone from a different social sphere is not easy.

programme.desc: A reclusive English teacher, living alone in the wake of a tragedy, attempts to reconnect with his teenage daughter for one last chance at redemption.

programme.title: Love Island: Aftersun
programme.desc: Laura Whitmore is joined by celebrity superfans Rosie Jones, Sonny Jay and Nella Rose, plus the latest islanders to be dumped, for the ultimate weekly Love Island debrief.

programme.title: Self Reliance
programme.desc: A man receives an offer to win $1 million by playing a game where he must outwit hunters who are trying to kill him. He soon realizes they can only attack him when he's alone, but none of his friends or family believe the game is real.

programme.title: Youngblood
programme.desc: Follows Dean Youngblood, a hockey prodigy who joins the Hamilton Bulldogs and has to deal with toxic behavior during his journey to the National Hockey League draft.

programme.title: Fairyland
programme.desc: A father-daughter relationship evolves through an era of Bohemian decadence in the 1970s San Francisco to the sober and heartbreaking era of the AIDS crisis in the 1980s.

programme.title: Shoresy
programme.desc: The Bulldogs celebrate their NEOSHO record and take on the Brooks Barrelmen and the Freezer twins.

programme.title: This Time Each Year
programme.desc: Despite a trial separation, Lauren pretends to still be with her husband, Kevin, to placate her overbearing mother. The ruse may be just what the couple needs to finally work on their marriage.

programme.title: Dark Side of the 90s
programme.desc: In the '90s, parents and kids bonded over collecting playful plush toys known as Beanie Babies until the toy's creator, Ty Warner, used the internet's power to create a frenzied market.

programme.title: Undercover Grandpa
programme.desc: A shy young man turns to his grandfather and his grandfather's old war buddies to help him rescue the woman of his dreams from kidnappers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Mutant Mayhem
programme.desc: After years of being sheltered from the human world, the Turtle brothers set out to win the hearts of New Yorkers and be accepted as normal teenagers. Their new friend, April O'Neil, helps them take on a mysterious crime syndicate, but they soon get in over their heads when an army of mutants is unleashed upon them.

programme.title: An Autumn Romance
programme.desc: A woman tries to save a small, historic hotel from developers, but she soon realizes that the man she's falling for is behind the hotel's development plans.

programme.title: White Bird: A Wonder Story
programme.desc: Julian has struggled to belong ever since he was expelled from his former school for his treatment of Auggie Pullman. Together, they find first love in a stunning, magical world of their own creation, while the boy's mother risks eve

programme.title: Transformers: Rise of the Beasts
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots take on their biggest challenge yet. When a new threat capable of destroying the entire planet emerges, they must team up with a powerful faction of Transformers known as the Maximals to save Earth.

programme.title: A '90s Christmas
programme.desc: A workaholic lawyer destined to spend Christmas alone is transported back to 1999 after an unexpected run in with a particularly wise ride-share driver.

programme.title: Little jesus

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon - Homecoming

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Movie
programme.desc: When their biggest rival, Humdinger, starts wreaking havoc as the mayor of Adventure City, Ryder and everyone's favorite heroic pups kick into high gear to face the challenge. Armed with exciting new gadgets and gear, the PAW Patrol joins forces with a savvy dachshund to save the citizens of Adventure City.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Mighty Movie
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol pups magically gain superpowers after a meteor strikes Adventure City. However, things take a turn for the worse when Humdinger and a mad scientist steal their powers and turn themselves into supervillains. As the team springs into action to save the city, Skye soon learns that even the smallest pup can make the biggest difference.

programme.title: Paws in the City

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
